title: How to hide a row in Monday.com
excerpt: Does anyone know how to simply hide a ROW like you can in Excel?

posts.author: intercultural.aware (Wayne K. Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know how to simply hide a ROW like you can in Excel?

posts.author: Dmitry (Dmitry Rasin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
hiding a row is not possible as far as I know. You can hide columns within the restriction settings (view and change permissions).

If you have tasks or items to be hidden - maybe move them to a private board and just invite people that is allowed to see all that items?

Cheers

posts.author: intercultural.aware (Wayne K. Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you very much Dmitry. Too bad we cannot hide ROWs. Not sure why they wouldn’t have that option. Seems pretty simple compared to everything else they have.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
intercultural.aware:

Not sure why they wouldn’t have that option. Seems pretty simple compared to everything else they have.

On the surface, I agree.

But Monday is more about the vertical (columns) than the horizontal (rows). And it’s not really a spreadsheet even though it often acts like one.
